94:
WITH oldest_female AS (
    SELECT client_id, birth_date, district_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
    AND birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
),
min_salary_among_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(d.A11) AS min_salary
    FROM district d
    JOIN oldest_female of ON d.district_id = of.district_id
),
relevant_clients AS (
    SELECT of.client_id, of.district_id
    FROM oldest_female of
    WHERE of.district_id IN (
        SELECT d.district_id FROM district d
        JOIN min_salary_among_oldest m ON d.A11 = m.min_salary
    )
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, 
       (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - (SELECT min_salary FROM min_salary_among_oldest) AS gap
FROM relevant_clients rc
JOIN disp d ON rc.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id;	----- bird -----	financial
95: SELECT a.account_id FROM account a INNER JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id WHERE d.client_id IN (SELECT c.client_id FROM client c WHERE c.birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client) AND c.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district)));	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT superhero.id) AS hero_count
FROM hero_power
JOIN superpower ON hero_power.power_id = superpower.id

  AND superhero.height_cm > 200;	----- bird -----	superhero

1028:
SELECT Team.team_long_name
FROM Match
JOIN League ON Match.league_id = League.id
JOIN Team ON Match.away_team_api_id = Team.team_api_id
WHERE League.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
  AND Match.season = '2009/2010'
  AND Match.away_team_goal > Match.home_team_goal
GROUP BY Team.team_long_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	european_football_2
1029:
SELECT t.team_long_name AS team_name, MAX(ta.buildUpPlaySpeed) AS max_build_up_play_speed
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ta.team_api_id
ORDER BY max_build_up_play_speed DESC
LIMIT 4;	----- bird -----	european_football_2
1149:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inpatient_male_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_male_count,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
    THEN ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0) / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 4)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS inpatient_to_outpatient_ratio
FROM Patient
WHERE SEX = 'M'	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction
1150: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN Sex = 'F' AND CAST(strftime('%Y', Birthday) AS INTEGER) > 1930 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN Sex = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS percentage FROM Patient;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction
